message:
feat: enable data maintenance tickers by calling EnsureLifecycleDefaults at daemon startup (gt-7ul7)

The daemon loads patrol config from mayor/daemon.json at startup, but if the
file was created before lifecycle tickers were implemented, the data maintenance
patrols (wisp_reaper, compactor_dog, doctor_dog, jsonl_git_backup, dolt_backup,
scheduled_maintenance) are missing from the config. Since these are opt-in
(disabled when nil), they never run.

Fix: call EnsureLifecycleConfigFile() at daemon startup to auto-populate any
missing lifecycle tickers with sensible defaults. This is idempotent and
preserves existing user configuration (including explicitly disabled patrols).

Adds a regression test simulating the production scenario: core patrols present
but all data maintenance tickers missing.
